description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image (docker:latest) with Docker-in-Docker service and defines two manual stages: canary and staging. Add a before_script that sets Auto DevOps variables, exports CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY, CI_APPLICATION_TAG, CI_CONTAINER_NAME, TILLER_NAMESPACE and defines helper functions (sast_container, codeclimate, sast, deploy, install_dependencies, setup_docker, setup_test_db, download_chart, ensure_namespace, check_kube_domain, build, install_tiller, create_secret, dast, performance, persist_environment_url, delete). Define a .canary job in the canary stage that runs only on the master branch when a Kubernetes cluster is active, and executes the exact script lines: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, deploy canary; the job is manual. Define a .staging job in the staging stage with the same only/kubernetes rules and master ref, and runs the script lines: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, deploy; also manual. Both jobs set environment URLs using $AUTO_DEVOPS_DOMAIN and do not produce artifacts, relying on the deploy function to push Docker images to the GitLab Container Registry via Helm.
